channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Maura Higgins confirmed for Dancing With The Stars as her US career continues to grow
item.description: Maura Higgins has been confirmed as the first contestant for the upcoming 35th season of the US television programme Dancing With The Stars, marking another significant step in her expanding career in...

item.title: Study finds land is the primary source of airborne microplastics, challenging earlier models
item.description: A new study from the University of Vienna offers a clearer understanding of how microplastics enter and move through the atmosphere. Researchers analyzed 2,782 global measurements of airborne micropla...

item.title: Silicon Valley's Tech Culture: Time for Reflection and Accountability
item.description: Silicon Valley has long been the breeding ground for an exclusive tech culture dominated by the so-called 'tech bros.' These individuals, often seen as modern-day heroes, have built empires based on t...

item.title: Exploring the Joy of Iconic French Cuisine and Timeless Literature
item.description: In this reflective piece, Marita van der Vyver draws a thoughtful parallel between two of life’s great pleasures: memorable meals and classic literature. She describes how tasting a renowned tradition...

item.title: Jomo Kenyatta Lookalike Joins Fuel Protests in Nairobi After Returning from the US
item.description: A video of Michael Ngige, a lookalike of Kenya's first president Jomo Kenyatta, has gone viral after he was seen leading chants during protests in Nairobi on April 21, 2026. Ngige, who had spent over ...

item.title: Sharks Seek Improved Performance Against Edinburgh Despite Low URC Chances
item.description: The Sharks are heading into their URC clash against Edinburgh at the Hive Stadium with slim hopes of reaching the quarter-finals, sitting 11th on the points table and 11 points adrift of the Bulls in ...

item.title: Comedian Mulamwah Opens Up About His Businesses and Monthly Income
item.description: Kenyan comedian Kendrick Mulamwah has recently shared details about his entrepreneurial ventures and monthly earnings, leaving many fans impressed. In a video posted on TikTok by Qui Nganga, Mulamwah ...

item.title: NYSC Adjusts Orientation Camp Dates for Osun and Enugu Due to Renovations
item.description: The National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) don announce say the orientation camp dates for 2026 Batch ‘A’ Stream II for Osun and Enugu don change. Normally, all states dey start their orientation from Ap...

item.title: U.S. Justice Department reintroduces firing squad executions
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice has reinstated firing squads as a permissible method of execution, a move aimed at increasing and expediting federal executions. This shift comes as the Trump administra...

item.title: Parents halt schooling at Gauteng primary school over unsafe infrastructure and delays
item.description: Parents at Dulcie September Primary School in Rabie Ridge, Midrand, have kept their children at home for over two weeks due to what they describe as dangerous and deteriorating infrastructure. The sch...

item.title: India criticises Trump over sharing offensive remarks amid birthright citizenship debate
item.description: India has strongly criticised US President Donald Trump after he shared remarks on social media describing countries like India as “hellholes” in the context of birthright citizenship. The comments or...

item.title: Ontario to build OPP detachment as part of Ontario Place redevelopment
item.description: The Ontario government has announced plans to build a new Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) detachment at Ontario Place in Toronto as part of its broader redevelopment of the waterfront site. The propos...

item.title: Hadi Sirika Declares Interest in Katsina North Senate Seat for 2027 Elections
item.description: Former Aviation Minister, Hadi Sirika don officially announce say him wan run for Katsina North Senatorial seat for the 2027 election under All Progressives Congress (APC). For interview with Channels...

item.title: TRA Confirms Safety of Tourists in Maasai Mara Amid False Reports
item.description: The Tourism Regulatory Authority (TRA) has dismissed reports claiming that tourists were held hostage in the Maasai Mara National Reserve, stating categorically that such claims are false and misleadi...

item.title: Assisted Dying Bill Reaches an Impasse in Parliament, But the Debate Continues
item.description: The Assisted Dying Bill, which sought to legalise assisted dying in England and Wales, has now officially failed in Parliament after running out of time. The bill had previously passed the House of Co...

item.title: Blake Lively's Civil Trial Against Justin Baldoni Scheduled to Last Several Weeks
item.description: Blake Lively is set to face Justin Baldoni in a federal court trial in New York starting 18 May 2026, concerning allegations of harassment on the set of their film 'It Ends With Us' and an ensuing sme...

item.title: Two US Gene-Editing Startups for Embryos Shut Down Amid Funding and Legal Challenges
item.description: Two American companies, Manhattan Genomics and Bootstrap Bio, both launched with the goal of creating gene-edited babies to prevent serious diseases, have ceased operations. Manhattan Genomics closed ...

item.title: Pastor Kanyari Launches Campaign for Kasarani Parliamentary Seat
item.description: Renowned Kenyan preacher Pastor Victor Kanyari has officially announced his intention to contest for the Kasarani parliamentary seat in the upcoming 2027 General Election. Initially, Kanyari had aimed...

item.title: UEFA Hands Six-Match Ban to Benfica’s Prestianni Over Homophobic Remark Incident
item.description: UEFA don give Benfica winger Gianluca Prestianni six-match ban after dem find say him involve in discriminatory conduct during Champions League clash against Real Madrid for February. According to UEF...

item.title: Sandiganbayan justice questions state witness over alleged kickbacks in government projects
item.description: The Sandiganbayan has sharply questioned a state witness who claimed ignorance regarding alleged kickbacks in government infrastructure projects. During the hearing, the justice expressed frustration ...
